name: Escape From Tung Tung Sahur
short_description: You wake up trapped in a creepy, abandoned village — no lights, no friends, just you... and a whole lot of trouble. You’ve got one job: save the poor, caged Brainrot animals that the terrifying Tung Tung Sahur has locked up... and get them out safely.
detailed_description:
About This Game

You wake up trapped in a creepy, abandoned village — no lights, no friends, just you... and a whole lot of trouble. You’ve got one job: save the poor, caged Brainrot animals that the terrifying Tung Tung Sahur has locked up... and get them out safely.

Sounds easy? Oh, sweet summer child.
Tung Tung is always hunting. He knows you're here. He can smell your fear.
And he’s not alone.

  • Bombardino Crocodilo patrols the village skies, randomly bombing the map. When you hear him coming, you'd better find cover fast — or you’ll end up extra crispy.

  • Bombombini Gusini, Bombardino’s relentless brother, is circling above you at all times. If he spots you, he’ll immediately snitch to Tung Tung, who will come sprinting after you like he just clocked out for lunch.

Each time you play, new Brainrot animals need rescuing. New paths, new panic, new escape strategies. Will you sneak, run, or... cry a little in a corner?

Do you have what it takes to outsmart Tung Tung, dodge bombs, and free the Brainrot before it’s too late?

You better hope so.

Gameplay 

Rescue the Brainrot Animals!

Scattered across the map are 3 cages, each holding a Brainrot animal in need of rescue. To unlock a cage, you must find the missing words from the poem engraved on it, but beware! Some words are decoys meant to throw you off.

Dodge the bombs dropped by Bombardino Crocodilo and watch out for Tung Tung Sahur, if they catch you, it’s game over!

Every run is unique.The cage locations, the Brainrot animals inside, and the placement of words across the map change every time you play.

Game Modes:

  • Chill: No enemies. Take your time, explore the map, find the cages, and piece together the poems to save your Brainrot friends.

  • Normal:One Bombombini Gusini, one Bombardiro Crocodilo, and one Tung Tung Sahur are on the loose.

  • Brainrot:For the bravest players only! Face one Bombombini Gusini, plus three Bombardiro Crocodilo and three Tung Tung Sahur.

Need help or have questions?

Join our community on Discord:
